title: Aulonemia ulei
taxonomy: Aulonemia ulei is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Bambusoideae, which includes bamboo and other related grasses. Aulonemia ulei is further classified as a member of the tribe Bambuseae, a group of woody grasses commonly known as bamboo. This classification reflects the plant's physical characteristics and growth habits, which are typical of bamboo and other members of the Bambusoideae subfamily. The exact classification of Aulonemia ulei provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other grasses.
